title: Citrusy Greek Lemon Flatbread
description: A citrusy, flaky Greek dish featuring cumin and high-protein-friendly ingredients, perfect for a nostalgic breakfast.

ingredients.name: Extra virgin olive oil, for brushing

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the all-purpose flour, almond flour, cumin, and salt.
Add in the beaten egg and water. Stir until a dough forms; it will be sticky.
Transfer the dough onto a floured surface and knead gently for about 1 minute to form a smooth ball of dough.
Lightly grease a baking sheet with extra virgin olive oil and dust with flour. Place the dough on the prepared pan and press into an even thickness, about 1/4-inch thick.
Sprinkle lemon juice evenly over the flatbread and brush the top generously with olive oil.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown. Keep in a warm place to crisp up slightly more before serving.
Serve hot as a breakfast dish with your choice of high-protein toppings like scrambled eggs, hummus, or avocado smash.
